provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly scene concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and cultural detail, visible brushstrokes, Veshan scale-reader in a dim chamber — a weathered old reptilian examining shed warrior scales laid out on a heated bronze plate under a magnifying lens, tracing patterns with a thin bronze stylus, candle-like warm light, shelves of preserved scale collections in glass cases behind, across from the reader a young warrior sits with tail nervously low waiting for the reading, divination through biology
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine, heroic pose, action scene, combat, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, cute, chibi

judgment.explanation: Partial hit — atmosphere and style correct, some species anatomy or concept details missed.
